violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Can opener noted not properly cleaned/maintained.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hoods and filters noted not clean.

FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Can opener and cutting board not properly maintained. If cutting board staining cannot be removed by cleaning it indicates that it is need of replacement due to the grooves trapping material.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Boxes of to-go boxes and single use items noted being stored on the floor.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the ware-washing area under 3-compartment sink noted in need of cleaning.
